fields.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

After a successful Skill(dso:sprint) invocation, the orchestrator consumes the skill content returned by the Skill tool and executes the sprint workflow without re-invoking the tool or reading the SKILL.md file directly.

#### Actual Behavior

On session load, the orchestrator called Skill(dso:sprint) twice (both returned 'Successfully loaded skill'), then stated 'I have the SKILL.md content' and proceeded to execute Phase 1 — indicating it read the SKILL.md file via the Read tool instead of consuming the Skill tool result.

### 6. Logs

```
Skill(dso:sprint)
  ⎿  Successfully loaded skill

Skill(dso:sprint)
  ⎿  Successfully loaded skill

  Read 1 file (ctrl+o to expand)

I have the SKILL.md content. Let me now proceed with Phase 1 of the sprint.
```
fields.title: dso:sprint: Skill tool invoked twice on session load -> orchestrator falls back to Read tool instead of consuming Skill result
